name: zsazsa-gir
description: General Intelligence Requirement (GIR) managed by the zsazsa CTI program

topic.description: Short descriptive title for this ongoing monitoring area

description.description: Detailed description of the monitoring requirement

review-cycle.description: How frequently this GIR is reviewed (Monthly / Quarterly / etc.)

owner-uuid.description: UUID of the owning stakeholder MISP event

collection-sources.description: JSON array of collection source names

geographic-scope.description: JSON array of countries/regions to monitor (from MISP Country galaxy)

sectors.description: JSON array of industry sectors to monitor (from MISP Sector galaxy)

threat-types.description: JSON array of threat categories to monitor (free text)

threat-actors.description: JSON array of specific threat actors to track (from MISP Threat Actor galaxy)

out-of-scope.description: JSON array of explicitly excluded topics (free text)

technology.description: JSON array of technology scope values

vendor.description: JSON array of vendor scope values

incident.description: JSON array of related incident identifiers

campaign.description: JSON array of related campaign names

output-format.description: JSON array of expected deliverable formats

distribution.description: JSON array of stakeholder UUIDs for the deliverable recipients (legacy records may still contain stakeholder names)

next-review.description: Date of the next scheduled review (ISO 8601)

mitre-attack-techniques.description: JSON array of MITRE ATT\&CK technique strings (from misp-galaxy:mitre-attack-pattern)
